mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM, VAC_ID, VAC_BANK_CD FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, VAC_ID, f_get_kt_code_nm('PPS_VAC', 'BANK_CODE', VAC_BANK_CD) VAC_BANK_CD from pps_vac where agent_id = #{orgnId} ORDER By OPEN_DATE desc) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT TO_CHAR(REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') regDttm, DPST_RSN dpstRsn, DPST_AMT dpstAmt, STOF_AMT stofAmt, (DPST_AMT - STOF_AMT) remains FROM CLS_DPST_INFO WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} ORDER BY REG_DTTM desc
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS IN ('A', 'S') AND (SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} OR CONTRACT_NUM = #{subscriberNo})
